install: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && git submodule update --init --recursive contracts/lib/cross-chain-swap && (command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -fsSL https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && "$HOME/.foundry/bin/foundryup")) && PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" forge build && (command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || (sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq docker.io))
